Oahu Kayak Rentals & Tours

Kailua Kayak & E-Bike Adventures With Aloha

Enjoy the Best Kayaking & E-Bike Experiences in Oahu, Hawaii

Kayak in Kailua to the Mokulua Islands, Kayak in Kualoa to Mokolii (Chinaman’s Hat), Kayak near Kaneohe Bay, or Explore the jungle river of Kahana near Laie.

** Book Online **

Kayak Tours

Kayak Rentals

Electric Bike Rentals & Tours

Kayak and Explore Chinaman’s Hat, Kahana Bay, Kawela Bay, Kaneohe Bay, Kailua Bay and More

We make renting e-bikes, kayaks and exploring Oahu a breeze. Pick up kayaks and beach gear at our storefront in Kailua.

Rent Kayaks & Beach Gear

**More Rental Info **

“Great tour! It was so fun to e-bike, kayak, and see wildlife in one adventure”

Kailua E-Bike Kau Kau Guided Scenic Food Tour Adventure

Discover the highlights of Kailua as you ride, taste, and explore on our guided E-bike Kau Kau adventure!

E-Bike Kau Kau Guided Adventure

Popoia Kailua’s Flat Island Guided Kayak & E-Bike Adventure

Ride, paddle, and explore on our guided e-bike and kayak adventure to Flat Island! Cruise to Kailua beach on E-bikes, then paddle over to Flat Island with our expert guides as you learn about local culture, sea life, and optional snorkeling.

Kailua’s Flat Island Guided Kayak and E-Bike Adventure

Mokulua Islands Kayak Adventure

Get more info about our self-guided kayak tour out to Kailua’s twin islands.

Kayak to Kailua’s Twin Islands

Active Oahu, LLC Wins 2022 Tripadvisor Travelers’ Choice Award for Tours and Activities

Laie, Hawaii – July 28, 2022 – Active Oahu, LLC today announced it has been recognized by Tripadvisor as a 2022 Travelers’ Choice award winner for Tours and Activities.  The award celebrates businesses that have received great traveler reviews from travelers around the globe on Tripadvisor over t...

🌊 Active Oahu Tours

Guided kayak, e-bike, and outdoor adventures on Oahu's stunning windward coast. Experience the real Hawaii with local guides who call these waters home.
